METIS Mixins
============

Mixins that inject tag parameters into ``DataItem`` and ``RecipeImpl`` classes
via Python's multiple inheritance mechanism.  See :doc:`../concepts/parametrization`
for a conceptual explanation.

.. automodule:: pymetis.instruments.metis.mixins.band
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

.. automodule:: pymetis.instruments.metis.mixins.detector
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

.. automodule:: pymetis.instruments.metis.mixins.target
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

.. automodule:: pymetis.instruments.metis.mixins.source
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:
